title: crotalaria oxyphylla
intro: Crotalaria oxyphylla is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria oxyphylla include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
